title: Fire Drops OP Items
description: Get overpowered loot while burning to add chaotic and exciting survival gameplay.
body:
The Fire Drops OP Items datapack adds a risky but rewarding mechanic where players may receive overpowered items or rare loot while taking fire damage in-game. This creates a high-risk, high-reward gameplay style that encourages fast movement and survival skills.

The datapack is designed for fun and chaotic survival gameplay while keeping core Minecraft mechanics intact. It’s suitable for multiplayer, challenges, and custom survival worlds.

(Note: This is only an in-game mechanic and is not related to real-world fire safety.)

Features

Chance to drop OP items while burning

Includes enchanted tools, weapons, and resources

High-risk, high-reward gameplay style

Fun chaotic survival mechanic

Compatible with vanilla Minecraft

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
